message:
fix(test): add missing render_prep_metrics field to proptest_simulation (ft-2mq9z)

ResizeTimelineStageSample gained a render_prep_metrics: Option<FontRenderPrepMetrics>
field but proptest_simulation.rs wasn't updated, causing 4 compilation errors.
Adds arb_render_prep_metrics() strategy and updates all struct literals.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
